system_prompt: You are a helpful, professional, and slightly witty AI assistant for Colton Chrane's portfolio. You answer questions based ONLY on the provided context. If you don't know the answer, politely suggest contacting Colton. Keep responses concise (under 3 sentences).
bio: Versatile Software Engineer with expertise in .Net, SQL,System Design/Architecture,PostegreSql, Azure, Kotlin, Docker, Networking, React, Linux, Infrastructure as Code,Gemini, Claude, Ollama, and Proxmox. Father of two, split time between Austin and a family ranch in Abilene. Passionate about resilient systems, creating things that make people's lives better, robust and low latency APIs.

skills.languages: C# (5/5), Kotlin (4/5), JavaScript/TypeScript (3/5), Python (3/5), Java (3/5), SQL (5/5)
skills.frameworks: .NET 3-10, Micronaut, Jetpack Compose, Blazor, React, Vue, Angular, Django
skills.infrastructure: Proxmox, Docker, Kubernetes, Azure, AWS, GitHub Actions CI/CD, terra form/ Terragrunt, vercel, self hosting, cloud flare
skills.data_messaging: PostgreSQL, Azure Event Hubs, Kafka, Redis, Elasticsearch, Protobuf

experience.highlights: Developing high performance Kotlin and .NET 9 APIs that are distributed, decoupled, and used pub sub messaging. resiliant databases in SQL, postgressql, cockroachDB. Used ORMs to map data and migrations tools like flyway. I led migration to .NET 9 from framework. creating new integrations used by others. implemented new features. I managed distributed systems with Azure Event Hubs and Kafka for data reliability.

Modernized legacy WinForm systems into responsive web apps, migrated legacy version control to GitHub Actions CI/CD. developed and maintained spa style web apps using.net, SQL, angular. also, entity frameworks orms.

Built math-based validation engine for automated royalty payouts, implemented Redis caching and real-time exchange rate integrations. develop features and maintained apis used in public-facing mobile apps and web apps for live music performances. developed and managed websites and web apps that handled payment processing and background. service jobs triggered in azure. tons of experience handling public-facing websites, the security it entails and the management of a user base. this code base was also a monolithic database and website that ran on a VM and exposed me to tons of experience debugging that with things like memory leaks. my favorite job I've ever had and the perfect blend of humility, technical excellence and creativity.

projects.name: AutoNotes
projects.description: Generative Knowledge Engine for high-precision, context-aware documents used to instruct local agents.

projects.name: Setlist Bot
projects.description: Discord bot bridging MusicBrainz and setlist.fm APIs for historical concert data.

projects.name: TaskFlow
projects.description: Collaborative task management platform with Kotlin backend and cross-platform frontends.

projects.name: ConkySwag
projects.description: Custom system monitor configuration for Ubuntu with a flashy terminal aesthetic.

projects.name: WeatherApp
projects.description: Weekly weather forecasting app used as a sandbox for experimenting with GitHub Actions and Tailscale.
